items.name: grill-me
items.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan until shared understanding.

items.name: grill-with-docs
items.description: Grill a plan against the project's domain model and existing docs.

items.name: caveman
items.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode that cuts token usage while keeping technical accuracy.

items.name: handoff
items.description: Compact the current conversation into a handoff document for another agent to pick up.

items.name: writing-style
items.description: Clear, functional English style for all prose.
